notes:
**Smoother updates for managed-server users.**

When you update Keen with a Keen Cloud server, the app now updates your server *before* restarting — so you boot straight into a compatible backend instead of landing on a "Backend needs an update" gate. Mid-update restarts no longer trigger scary "Server image not verified" warnings, brief connection blips are handled gracefully, and out-of-sync messaging is clearer and more honest.

Desktop-only — your server and data are untouched (aligned with keen-backend 0.22.0).

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.22.2_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.22.2_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates.
